summary: BBD Prospect Intelligence V1 tested end-to-end. All backend endpoints (seed, list, sort, filter, detail, 404, stats, AI comment + cache) return correct data. Frontend dashboard loads 25 rows, 4 KPIs, react-leaflet dark map with circles, search filter and slider work, row click navigates to detail page which shows score 70.2, breakdown, 3 info cards, AI comment (cached from backend), Google Maps link and back link. Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY generates a coherent French comment in ~6s and second call is served cached=true with identical text.
passed: GET /api/communes returns {count:25, items:[...]} sorted by score desc, with breakdown/rank/zone_climatique=H1/lat/lon/dossiers/nb_maisons
GET /api/communes/74099 returns Gruffy details, score 70.2, breakdown present
GET /api/stats returns nb_communes=25, nb_score_sup_70=1, nb_score_sup_80=0, score_moyen=63.4, total_maisons_individuelles=6445, total_dossiers_estimes=2411, top_commune=Gruffy
POST /api/communes/74099/ai-comment: first call cached=false (~6s, Claude Sonnet 4.5, French, 2-3 sentences), second call cached=true with identical text
Dashboard: 4 KPIs render (kpi-communes=25, kpi-prioritaires=1, kpi-maisons=6445, kpi-dossiers=2411)
communes-map visible, table has 25 row-{code_insee} rows

failed.issue: GET /api/communes/{code} does not return 'rank' field (only computed in list endpoint). Frontend detail page consequently shows 'RANG #—'.
failed.evidence: curl /api/communes/74099 -> has_rank=False; UI shows 'RANG #—' on Gruffy detail

action_items: Optional: compute and include 'rank' in GET /api/communes/{code_insee} response so the detail page shows the correct rank instead of '#—' (already flagged as non-blocking by main agent).
